---
title: "About"
image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/41604567
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 12em

  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunghuuhoang

---
### Quick intro
I'm Peter Hoang, an ML/AI Engineer with extensive software experience and product building 
experience. I've been a professional software engineer since 2009. 

My current AI stack is Python-based (Pytorch, Huggingface, ...). Other techs that I'm currently productive with include: Django, Javascript, Html/Css, Postgres, and a little of React Native. 


### CV
<a id="short-cv"></a>
In 2023, I went back to school and currently doing a Msc in CS at <a href="https://www.csd.uwo.ca" target="_blank">Western University</a>, Canada (2023 - 2024).

I feel fortunate to witness and experience the biggest breakthroughs in AI in a long time. In 2024, my main focus is to continue learning and expanding my knowledge of AI.

For details on my previous work, please check out my <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunghuuhoang/" target="_blank">CV on Linkedin</a>. 


### Connect

Please connect with me on <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunghuuhoang/" target="_blank">Linkedin</a>.

I have a main blog at <a href="https://peterhung.org/?r=ph-gh" target="_blank">peterhung.org</a> where I write, mostly about education, business and life lessons, in both Vietnamese and English. (For a list of articles written in English, please use <a href="https://peterhung.org/tag/english-articles/" target="_blank">this link</a>.)
